channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Engineered air cavities dramatically enhance emission in atom-thin semiconductors
item.description: Researchers have developed a novel approach to significantly boost the optical performance of atomically thin semiconductors without altering the material itself. By placing a single-layer tungsten di...

item.title: Philippines Boosts Halal Tourism to Appeal to Muslim Visitors
item.description: The Philippines has been making strides in boosting its halal tourism sector to attract more Muslim visitors. According to Department of Tourism Undersecretary Myra Paz Valderrosa-Abubakar, halal tour...

item.title: Which Australian suburbs are seeing property sales at a loss
item.description: Most Australian property owners are still making a profit when selling, with 95.9 per cent of properties sold in the December 2025 quarter returning gains, according to Cotality’s Pain and Gain Report...

item.title: Kenyan Health Minister Aden Duale Was Not Injured in Road Accident, Social Media Claims False
item.description: A viral social media post claimed that Kenyan Health Minister Aden Duale was seriously injured in a road crash along the Kisumu-Busia highway on 8 March 2026. The post falsely stated that he was hospi...

item.title: FKF Confirms No FIFA Women’s Development Funds Received Yet
item.description: Hussein Mohammed, the President of Football Kenya Federation (FKF), has openly stated that since his administration took over in December 2024, they have not received any funding from the FIFA Women's...

item.title: Kaduna Cleric Denies Arrest After Hosting Peter Obi
item.description: Kaduna-based Islamic cleric Ahmad Umar has dismissed rumors claiming he was arrested after hosting former Labour Party presidential candidate Peter Obi. The controversy began when Obi posted on social...

item.title: Detectives secure Kericho cemetery as they prepare to exhume suspected mass grave
item.description: Detectives from the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) have moved to Makaburini Cemetery in Kericho after reports emerged of a suspected mass grave where about 14 bodies were buried secretly...

item.title: Lewis Hamilton Bonds with Kim Kardashian and Her Son During Tokyo Visit
item.description: Kenyan people have been talking a lot about Lewis Hamilton, the Formula 1 champion, and Kim Kardashian, the reality TV star, after their recent trip to Tokyo. The two have been quietly seeing each oth...

item.title: Delhi Announces 2 Free LPG Cylinders for Every Household in 2026 Budget
item.description: In the Delhi Budget for 2026, the city government has made a significant announcement for households across the capital. Every household will receive two free LPG (liquefied petroleum gas) cylinders. ...

item.title: Seventy killed in drone strike on Sudanese hospital, WHO reports
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has confirmed that 70 people, including women, children, and medical staff, have died following a drone strike on Al Deain Teaching Hospital in East Darfur, Sudan, ...

item.title: Girlguiding sets September deadline for transgender members and volunteers to depart following Supreme Court ruling
item.description: Girlguiding, the UK's largest organisation for girls and young women with approximately 300,000 members aged four to 18 and 80,000 volunteers, has announced that transgender girls must leave the organ...

item.title: Supreme Court questions maintainability of ED plea alleging obstruction by Mamata Banerjee during I-PAC raid
item.description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday questioned the West Bengal government on its objection to the Enforcement Directorate's petition under Article 32, which alleges obstruction by Chief Minister Mamata Baner...

item.title: ADB Rolls Out Financial Aid to Help Developing Countries Cope with Middle East Crisis
item.description: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) has come forward with a comprehensive financial support package aimed at helping developing member countries handle the economic and financial fallout of the ongoing M...

item.title: Senator Ali Ndume Urges FG to Equip Nigerian Army with Better Arms as Terrorists Overwhelm Troops in Borno Communities
item.description: Former Senate Leader, Senator Ali Ndume, don raise serious alarm over the ongoing insurgency for Borno State and the entire Northeast region. After him visit the attacked areas of Ngoshe and Pulka tog...

item.title: The potential impact of a Mediterranean-style Mind diet on brain health in older adults
item.description: Recent research highlights the potential benefits of a brain-focused variation of the Mediterranean diet, known as the Mind diet, in supporting cognitive health in older adults. The diet emphasises gr...

item.title: One Dead, 40 Injured in Separate Gas and Tanker Incidents in Lagos and Calabar
item.description: Na serious matter wey happen for two different places for Nigeria. For Lagos, along Lekki-Epe Expressway for Sangotedo area, one tipper truck wey dey overspeed ram into one gas tanker from behind for ...

item.title: Zanzibar Research Centre urged to train stakeholders on using research for better policy and public services
item.description: The President of Zanzibar, Dr Hussein Ali Mwinyi, has instructed the Zanzibar Research Centre for Economic, Social and Policy Analysis (ZRCP) to hold meetings and forums that will gather different sta...

item.title: Princess Beatrice and Edo Mapelli Mozzi's marriage reportedly facing difficulties
item.description: Princess Beatrice and Edoardo Mapelli Mozzi's marriage is reportedly in trouble, with recent reports suggesting that their relationship has been strained for some time. The couple married in 2020 afte...

item.title: Tanzania Expands Kiswahili Language Teaching with 20 Centres Abroad and 35 at Home
item.description: The Tanzanian government dey seriously promote Kiswahili language both within the country and internationally. Minister Paul Makonda announced say dem wan create opportunities for people in areas like...

item.title: Dollarama reports solid fiscal results but forecasts moderated same-store sales growth for the year ahead
item.description: Dollarama Inc. has released its financial results for the fiscal year ended February 1, showing continued growth despite some softening in consumer behaviour. The Montreal-based discount retailer repo...
